name: reading-website

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,blue "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix apps/web && npm run test --prefix apps/api
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && node --check apps/api/app.js && node --check apps/api/index.js && node --check apps/api/routes/auth.js && node --check apps/api/routes/books.js && node --check apps/api/routes/friends.js && node --check apps/api/middleware/auth.js && node --check apps/api/config/env.js

description: Full-stack social reading tracker with Google OAuth, Google Books search, reading analytics, and friends.
